page.title: Category:Articles that may contain original research

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Category:Articles_that_may_contain_original_research]]
revision.text:
{{Parent monthly clean up category|Original research|Original Research, May Contain|shortcut=CAT:OR}} Wikipedia articles that may contain [[Wikipedia:No original research|original research]] belong to this category. To add an article to this category, put {{tlx|Original research}} on the page; {{tlx|OR}} can also be used for inline original research.
[https://tools.wmflabs.org/massviews/?platform=all-access&agent=user&source=category&target=https%3A%2F%2Fen.wikipedia.org%2Fwiki%2FCategory%3AArticles_that_may_contain_original_research&range=last-week&subjectpage=1&subcategories=1&sort=views&direction=1& '''Pages in this category sorted by importance/popularity'''] (Takes a few minutes to load due to the size of this list)
[[Category:Wikipedia articles with content issues]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles with sourcing issues]] {{CatAutoTOC}}
